hero.title: Dodamdodam Korean Language School
hero.subtitle: Growing together in Korean, opening doors to tomorrow

about.label: about
about.title: About
about.body: Dodamdodam is a place for children and families who love Korean language and culture. We help students read, write, sing, and enjoy learning Hangul.

vision.label: vision
vision.title: Vision
vision.lead: We broaden horizons through Korean and grow together in community.
vision.card1Body: Age-appropriate classes to build a solid foundation in Hangul.
vision.card2Body: Traditions, holidays, and stories bring Korea closer.
vision.card3Body: A warm place of learning connected to families and the neighborhood.

teachers.label: teachers
teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.lead: Meet the teachers who walk with students each day.
teachers.placeholder: Profiles and greetings are coming soon.

schedule.label: schedule
schedule.title: Class schedule
schedule.note: Final schedules are announced each term.
